dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates perfect adherence to the governance framework. Both the rules-context-loader and alignment-engine spans completed successfully with schema validation events, ensuring that architectural constraints were loaded and applied correctly.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map span produced 6,464 completion tokens, exceeding the baseline performance. This indicates a highly detailed mapping of architectural changes and their downstream effects, supported by a successful schema validation.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The progression from the alignment-engine to the architecture-intent-generator remains robust. The system effectively synthesized identified gaps into a final intent document, though the intent generation token count was slightly lower than the reasoning phase.
